rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts, assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features, not implementation-only subcomponent paths
Implementation contracts may use assign statements for output bindings but not guarantee statements
Only include concrete bounds or named constants in type scope assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted identifiers
Constants and equations are declared at the component type level
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
